title: Smart Portfolio Dashboard
description: A responsive GitHub Pages dashboard for presenting engineering projects, resume highlights, and blog content with JSON-powered cards.

title: ESP32 Machine Monitor
description: Sample embedded monitoring concept for reading sensor values, tracking equipment status, and publishing lightweight dashboard data.

title: Lift Component Design Notes
description: Documentation-oriented engineering design sample focused on component improvement, manufacturability, and practical review checkpoints.

title: Electronics Lab Tracker
description: A sample lab tracking system for organizing circuits, test readings, observations, and maintenance tasks for electronics workflows.

title: CNC Process Checklist
description: A structured checklist concept for CNC setup, quality verification, tool condition review, and production handover.

title: Sensor Data Landing Page
description: A fast static landing page concept for presenting sensor analytics, system status, and technical documentation.

title: Arduino Safety Indicator
description: Prototype concept for a safety indicator using simple inputs, LED status outputs, and readable wiring documentation.

title: Broadcast Electronics Notes
description: A technical notes project inspired by FM radio training, covering signal chain awareness and practical maintenance observations.

title: Diploma Notes
description: A separate student-friendly study platform for Kerala Diploma learners with syllabus access, lesson sections, model question paper links, and organized materials.
